message:
test(search): add 21 proptest serde/wire roundtrips for daemon protocol types

New proptest file covering DaemonRequest, DaemonResponse, EmbedRequest,
and EmbedResponse with serde JSON roundtrip, wire codec roundtrip
(to_json_bytes/from_json_bytes), Clone/Debug properties, wire format
shape validation, and known wire format unit tests. Feature-gated on
semantic-search.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
